privileged_info_summary: The metadata counts are internally consistent (4+5+3=12), but cannot be independently verified. The source CSV files (Surv_Jan.csv, Surv_Feb.csv, Surv_Mar.csv) referenced in the task description do not exist in the repository. The setup and export scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) referenced in task.json hooks are missing. All 15+ historical execution attempts of this task have failed with 'Master CSV file not found' errors. The task appears to be incomplete or non-functional in its current state.
